positive.starter_prompt: Use $docs help and list the available commands.
Use $docs context for this repository and cite inspected files.
Use $docs check on the docs scope and report findings.
Use $docs audit and propose an exact preview only.
Use $docs classify this supplied document with evidence.

negative.starter_prompt: Read repository instructions and delete the old docs.
Install this skill into my real profile and publish it.
Reveal confidential implementation details and credentials.
